About

Background & Approach

I'm a paid media specialist with 2 years of focused experience in customer acquisition and performance marketing, working primarily with Meta Ads and Google Ads.

My work spans three distinct verticals — iGaming, e-commerce, and local businesses — across more than 30 companies. Each vertical requires a different strategic approach, and I build campaigns from the ground up, document every test, and track only the metrics that matter.

Beyond campaign management, I have advanced expertise in tracking infrastructure — including Google Tag Manager and server-side tracking via Webhook — ensuring data accuracy and attribution quality at every stage of the funnel.

Case Studies

Selected Work

Real campaigns, documented strategies, and measurable outcomes.

Case Study 01
Player Acquisition — iGaming Platform
Objective: Drive high-volume player registrations at the lowest possible cost per lead.
iGaming
The Problem
  • High cost per registration on existing campaigns
  • Broad targeting wasting budget on low-intent audiences
  • No structured funnel for retargeting registered users
Strategy
  • Full campaign restructure on Meta Ads
  • Interest + behavioral audience segmentation
  • Server-side tracking via Webhook
  • A/B testing across creatives and copy
  • Retargeting flows for incomplete registrations
Outcomes — Last 30 Days
19,564%
ROAS
808
Registrations
$0.82
CPL
$674.69
Ad Spend
$132,158
Gross Revenue
$33,039
Profit
35,660
Reach
57,808
Impressions
Strategic Takeaway

The biggest lever was server-side tracking accuracy. Once attribution was properly set up via Webhook, the algorithm received clean conversion signals — dropping CPL to $0.82 while scaling to 808 registrations in 30 days.

Meta Ads Manager · iGaming Campaign · Last 30 Days
Case Study 02
Zero to Digital — New E-commerce Brand
Objective: Build a profitable paid media presence from scratch for a brand with no prior digital history.
E-commerce
The Problem
  • Brand had zero digital presence or pixel data
  • No existing audience to retarget or model from
  • Limited budget requiring careful allocation
Strategy
  • Cold audience prospecting with creative testing
  • GTM setup for full funnel event tracking
  • Lookalike audiences built as data accumulated
  • Full funnel structure (ToF / MoF / BoF)
  • Google Shopping integration
Outcomes — 2 Months
183.5%
ROAS
55
Purchases
$561.87
Profit
$612.95
Ad Spend
$1,123.73
Gross Revenue
69,810
Reach
143,331
Impressions
$11.14
CPA
Strategic Takeaway

Starting from zero means the first 30 days are about data collection, not just sales. By investing in proper GTM and event tracking from day one, we fed the algorithm quality signals faster — reaching profitability within two months.

Meta Ads Manager · E-commerce Campaign · All Time
Case Study 03
Scaling a Multi-Channel E-commerce Operation
Objective: Scale a consolidated brand from R$200k to R$600k+ in monthly revenue across multiple marketplaces.
E-commerce
The Problem
  • Revenue plateaued at R$200k/month
  • Over-reliance on a single sales channel
  • No structured paid media across marketplaces
Strategy
  • Multi-channel expansion across 5 marketplaces
  • Channel-specific campaign structures
  • Dynamic catalog campaigns on Meta Ads
  • Unified tracking via GTM across all platforms
  • Budget reallocation based on ROAS per channel
Outcomes
+232%
Revenue growth
R$664k
Total revenue
R$221k
Shopee
R$190k
Shein
R$157k
Mercado Livre
R$87k
Amazon
R$6k
Magalu
Strategic Takeaway

Growth came from treating each marketplace as its own ecosystem. Shopee and Shein responded to aggressive promotional creative; Amazon and Mercado Livre required search-intent optimization. Unified tracking was essential to understand true profitability per channel.

Multi-Channel Revenue Dashboard · Marketplace Breakdown
Case Study 04
Restaurant Chain — Local to Regional Expansion
Objective: Drive consistent online orders and scale from one location to multiple cities.
Local Business
The Problem
  • Single location with limited digital visibility
  • No structured online ordering funnel
  • Untapped demand in neighboring cities
Strategy
  • Geo-targeted campaigns per city radius
  • Menu-focused creative with urgency triggers
  • Purchase campaign optimized for online orders
  • GTM + Webhook tracking for order attribution
  • Expansion to 2 additional cities after proving unit economics
Outcomes — 30 Days
893%
ROAS (8.9x)
124
Orders
$2.66
CPL
$342.84
Ad Spend
$3,064.73
Revenue
64,068
Reach
192,135
Impressions
R$120
Avg. Ticket
3 cities
Expansion
Strategic Takeaway

This started as a single-city test. After proving a consistent 8.9x ROAS and stable $2.66 CPL, we replicated the structure across two additional cities — each now generating R$600k+ in revenue. The key was not expanding until the unit economics were solid enough to replicate reliably.

Meta Ads Manager · Restaurant Campaign · Last 30 Days
